src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update LiquibaseProperties import path to match Spring Boot 3.2+ package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.liquibase.LiquibaseProperties was removed in Spring Boot 3.2; using the old path causes a compile error.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Exclude H2ConsoleAutoConfiguration to align with Spring Boot 3.2+ auto-configuration changes.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.2 changed the auto-configuration class name or behavior for H2 Console; explicit exclusion is required to prevent conflicts or startup issues in the new version.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated ILoggingEvent.getMarker() with getMarkerList() to comply with SLF4J API changes in newer versions.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: ILoggingEvent.getMarker() is deprecated and may be removed or behave differently in newer SLF4J versions; using getMarkerList() ensures compatibility with the current API.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.after:
List<Marker> markers = event.getMarkerList();
if ((markers != null && !markers.isEmpty() && markers.get(0).contains(CRLF_SAFE_MARKER)) || isLoggerSafe(event))

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import path for JCacheManagerCustomizer to match Spring Boot 3.2+ package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.cache.JCacheManagerCustomizer was moved to org.springframework.boot.cache.autoconfigure.JCacheManagerCustomizer in Spring Boot 3.2, causing a compile error if the old import is used.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import path for HibernatePropertiesCustomizer to match Spring Boot 3.2+ package structure.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.orm.jpa.HibernatePropertiesCustomizer was moved to org.springframework.boot.hibernate.autoconfigure.HibernatePropertiesCustomizer in Spring Boot 3.2, causing a compile error if the old import is used.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update import statements to reflect Spring Boot 3.2+ package restructuring for Liquibase and DataSource auto-configuration.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The classes `org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.jdbc.DataSourceProperties`, `org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.liquibase.LiquibaseDataSource`, and `org.springframework.boot.autoconfigure.liquibase.LiquibaseProperties` were moved to new packages in Spring Boot 3.2; using the old paths causes a compile error (class not found).

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace deprecated `Profiles.of()` with `matchesProfiles()` for environment profile checking.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method `Environment.acceptsProfiles(Profiles.of(...))` is deprecated/removed in favor of `Environment.matchesProfiles(...)` in newer Spring Framework versions; using the old API may cause compile warnings or errors depending on strictness, but primarily it's an API modernization required for compatibility with the new Spring Boot version's expectations.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Replace com.fasterxml.jackson imports with tools.jackson imports to align with the new Jackson distribution used in the target framework version.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The class com.fasterxml.jackson.core.JsonProcessingException and com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper are no longer available or are deprecated in favor of the tools.jackson package in the updated dependency tree, causing compilation errors.

src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.general_idea: Update the method signature to throw the new Jackson exception type instead of the old one.
src/main/java/io/github/jhipster/sample/.why_exists: The method previously threw JsonProcessingException which is no longer the correct type in the tools.jackson package; it must throw JacksonException to compile.
